title: Smart Diabetes Tracker
description: End-to-end diabetes tracking with Python and SQLite: glucose tracking, BMI, diet logs, and health insights. OOP, data validation, and reliability built in.

title: RAG Chatbot
description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation chatbot using embeddings, vector search, and LLMs for accurate, context-aware answers from external knowledge bases.

title: Generative AI Tools Suite
description: Suite of GenAI tools for text generation, Q&A, and workflow automation. Custom data pipelines and visualizations with Seaborn and Matplotlib.
